strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with diverse languages and frameworks (e.g., TypeScript, Node.js, D, Java) across multiple domains
Proven expertise in AI-adjacent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows) and cloud-native systems
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) demonstrating product vision and technical leadership
concerns: Limited direct AI/ML product development experience (no explicit AI models, frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch, or research publications)
No graduate degree in AI or related field (bachelor's in CS only)
Recent role (re:cinq) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than AI strategy or cloud product differentiation
response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and relevant AI-adjacent infrastructure experience, but lacks explicit AI/ML product development or advanced AI research background. His entrepreneurial stint (GISCollective) shows product vision, but not necessarily AI strategy. The resume emphasizes breadth over depth in AI-specific domains.
